sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n33116" key="e)ktulwtiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐκτῠλ-ωτικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n33116.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">removing callosities</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Antyll.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:44:23:29" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">44.23.29</biblScope></bibl>, cf. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:4:49" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Aeg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.49</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
